title: Full Stack AI Engineer
desc: Your personalized 6-week technical mastery plan. We've identified 4 critical skill gaps based on your target role at OpenAI.

weeks.title: Advanced React Patterns
weeks.desc: Mastering HOCs, Render Props, and the latest React 18 Concurrent features for scalable frontends.

weeks.title: LLM Integration & Prompt Eng.
weeks.desc: Learning LangChain, OpenAI API orchestration, and vector database management with Pinecone.

weeks.title: Scalable Backend with Go
weeks.desc: Building high-concurrency microservices and implementing gRPC communication protocols.

weeks.title: Cloud Infrastructure (AWS)
weeks.desc: Deploying AI models using AWS SageMaker and managing clusters with Kubernetes (EKS).

insights.text: Based on your progress in Week 1, we've updated your path. You skipped the "Basic JS" module—AI suggests adding a "TypeScript Design Patterns" deep-dive in Week 5 to compensate.
